_meta.description: Parallel passages in Scripture - same events or texts recorded in multiple books

categories.identical: Passages that are nearly word-for-word identical
categories.samuel_chronicles: Events recorded in both Samuel and Chronicles
categories.kings_chronicles: Events recorded in both Kings and Chronicles
categories.synoptic: Events recorded in Matthew, Mark, and/or Luke

_meta.note: Only includes passages with 2+ parallel accounts

parallel_sets.note: Psalm 108 combines portions of Psalms 57 and 60

parallel_sets.name: Balaam's Oracles
parallel_sets.note: Four parallel oracles with similar structure
